name: Lemony Split Pea Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 lb dried green split peas; picked over & rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a heavy 5-quart Dutch oven until crispy. Drain on paper towels and crumble.
2. Pour off all but 1 tablespoon of fat from the pot. Add onion and sauté for 3 minutes.
3. Add garlic and sauté for 2 minutes. Add peas, water, thyme, and bay leaf. Bring to a simmer and cook uncovered for 40 minutes.
4. Add carrots and potatoes, salt, and cook until vegetables are tender, about 40 more minutes. Remove the bay leaf.
5. Stir in crumbled bacon, diced Canadian bacon, lemon zest, and lemon juice. Heat through.
To Make Ahead: Omit lemon zest and juice. Cool slightly before refrigerating covered for up to 3 days.
To Serve: Reheat gently, stirring occasionally. Stir in lemon zest and juice just before serving.
